coreJobStatement: Enable controlled, safe, and weathertight passage through building openings in industrial, commercial, and residential structures while meeting fire resistance, thermal separation, acoustic attenuation, security, and structural loading code requirements
productJobStatement: Help Structural Profile & Frame Forming to deliver guide rail cross-sections that constrain sliding door panel travel within tolerance, bear repetitive roller contact loads, and maintain dimensional stability over 10-20 year service life under industrial operating conditions
anchorLevel: L5 (Precision Steel Track & Guide Profile within L6b Structural Profile & Frame Forming)

segments.name: High-cycle industrial door OEM
segments.characteristics: Doors rated >100K cycles/year (logistics, food, auto); guide surface wear is system life-limiter
segments.circumstance: Doors rated >100K cycles/year; guide surface wear and roller tracking precision are system life-limiters

segments.name: Fire-rated door manufacturer
segments.characteristics: EN 16034 / EN 1634 compliance mandatory; integral intumescent seal groove is code-critical
segments.circumstance: EN 16034/EN 1634 compliance mandatory; integral intumescent seal groove in profile cross-section
segments.alternativesDiffer: Only cold-drawn/precision achieves seal groove tolerance

segments.name: Automated high-speed door OEM
segments.characteristics: Door panel velocity >2 m/s; guide flange tolerance drives roller noise, vibration, seal integrity
segments.targetabilityReason: Tighter tolerance required vs structural sections
segments.circumstance: Door panel velocity >2 m/s; guide flange tolerance drives roller noise and seal integrity

segments.name: Security / blast door manufacturer
segments.characteristics: High-strength alloy steel (42CrMo4) required; hardened guide surface for tamper/impact resistance
segments.circumstance: High-strength alloy steel required; hardened guide surface for tamper and impact resistance

segments.name: Regional / custom door fabricator
segments.characteristics: Custom door geometry at moderate volume; no roll former investment; sources profiles externally
segments.targetabilityReason: External sourcing is the entire use case
segments.circumstance: Custom door geometry at moderate volume; no roll former investment

alternatives.name: In-house roll forming (Dahlstrom, Metform, Bradbury lines)
alternatives.tradeoffs: CapEx EUR 200-500K; tolerance +-0.2 mm max; no hardened surface; limited to pre-coated/galvanized coil; economical only at very high volumes. ~40% share.

alternatives.name: Cold-drawn / cold-rolled specialty profiles (ZOLLERN, GMH, Montanstahl)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 6-12 week lead time for new die; min ~100 kg batch; C10 corrosion mitigation required; steel-only. ~25% share.

alternatives.name: Standard hot-rolled structural sections (ArcelorMittal, voestalpine)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Tolerance only +-0.5 mm; no integral seal groove; no hardened running surface; limited shape catalog. ~25% share.

alternatives.name: Aluminum extruded profiles (Hydro, Constellium)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Aluminum door systems only - constraint C6 blocks ZOLLERN; lower surface hardness; insufficient for fire-rated steel door code compliance. ~10% share.

alternatives.name: Do nothing - CNC machine from bar stock
alternatives.tradeoffs: 40-70% material waste; highest unit cost; fully flexible for one-off; zero minimum batch; zero tooling investment.
